overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city street, starting at an intersection with a view of a towering megabuilding, observing a flying vehicle pass overhead, then proceeding along the sidewalk past neon-lit storefronts and crossing the street with pedestrians. The footage is from a video game engine with high-fidelity ray-traced graphics.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a street corner with a view of a weathered concrete building. The camera pans left to reveal a wide urban intersection dominated by a massive megabuilding tower in the distance. The camera tilts up to observe the tower and surrounding industrial architecture, then captures a flying vehicle passing overhead before returning to street level.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along the multi-lane street, turning right to follow the sidewalk. A black van drives past on the right side of the frame. The megabuilding remains visible in the distance but gradually becomes smaller as the camera progresses past commercial buildings with ground-floor storefronts.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk between buildings, the camera passes vibrant neon signs in pink and blue hues illuminating the storefronts. A palm tree stands in the center median ahead, and pedestrians walk in the same direction along the path. The environment feels enclosed by the surrounding commercial architecture.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a crosswalk and begins crossing the street alongside other pedestrians. An industrial building with exposed concrete and metal fixtures dominates the right side, while an overhead enclosed walkway spans the street in the distance. The scene transitions from the commercial strip to a more industrial zone as the crossing completes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a towering urban intersection into a dense commercial strip that eventually transitions into an industrial zone. It begins at a street corner, panning left to reveal a massive megabuilding and tilting upward to track a flying vehicle passing overhead before returning to street level. As the camera moves forward and turns right onto the sidewalk, the distant tower recedes while a black van drives past the frame. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed environment, gliding past vibrant pink and blue neon storefronts and pedestrians walking beside a central palm tree. Finally, the camera approaches a crosswalk and moves across the street, leaving the commercial lights behind as the view opens toward an industrial building with exposed metal fixtures and a distant overhead walkway.
